name: Curry Scallops and Cilantro Rice

source.cookbook: The Complete and Authentic Thai Curry Cookbook 2
source.author: Various

ingredients.item: cooked instant or quick-cooking brown rice

method: Pat the prepared scallops dry and season both sides with the pepper, 1/8 tsp.
of the salt and curry powder. Heat the butter in the medium-sized nonstick
skillet on medium heat till starting to sizzle. Put in scallops and cook 2-3
minutes on each side or till turning golden brown. Transfer out to a dish.
Put the rest 1/8 tsp. of the salt, lemon juice, scallions, cilantro and cooked
rice into pan. Cook and stir for roughly 60 seconds or till thoroughly heated.
Very flavorful and just what you need to get warm on a chilly night. Great
